name: Pineapple Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz size thawed frozen whipped topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the condensed milk and lemon juice in a bowl.
2. Stir well until combined.
3. Fold in the crushed pineapple.
4. Add the whipped topping to the mixture.
5. Spoon the filling into the prepared Graham cracker crust.
6. Chill before serving.
